plan.annotation: Reading top-to-bottom: validation precedes review; acceptance precedes commit; the adapter returns a versioned receipt. The failed-validation path returns issues to the client instead of advancing.

operations.label: Five lifelines
operations.value: User, NodeSlide client, planning model, validator, adapter

operations.label: Ordered flow
operations.value: Submit brief → bounded context → typed plan → validate → human review → commit → versioned receipt

operations.label: Failure return
operations.value: Validator returns issues to the client; the proposal does not advance to review or commit

plan.pptxFallback: Lifelines and directional messages are exported as editable PowerPoint shapes and connectors per the supplied contract; a static Mermaid image is not promotion-eligible.
plan.takeaway: A proposal reaches human review only after validation passes, and only accepted proposals are committed by the adapter.
plan.title: Request Lifecycle: Validation Gate Before Review
